summary: Iter8 — Validated the new /api/data/source-audit endpoint + LiveDataBadge component on both /app (Dashboard, compact) and /app/builder (Combo Builder, full). Backend pytest 6/6 PASSED. Frontend E2E on public URL confirmed: badge visible with correct text, tooltip opens on click and lists sports with LIVE tags. Login regression (5x admin) still 5×200.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py now 1917 lines — same recommendation as iter7 to split into routers (builder.py, admin.py, value_bets.py, data_audit.py).

In /api/data/source-audit the mock-detection heuristic is len(id)==16 && hex. Real Odds API ids are longer (~32+ chars) so this holds today, but if Odds API ever returns 16-hex-shaped ids the badge would flip to 'mixed' incorrectly. Consider a stronger provenance marker (e.g. explicit m.get('source') tagged at ingestion).

LiveDataBadge fetches /data/source-audit on every mount and every 60s — fine, but two badges (Dashboard + Builder) means 2 concurrent fetches when both mounted; consider a shared context/hook to dedupe.

Tooltip renders sport tags with class that applies text-transform: uppercase. DOM text is 'live' lowercase, which slightly hurts automated testability. Consider hardcoding 'LIVE'/'DÉMO' as the text so data-testid consumers can assert on innerText directly.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on badge+tooltip flow on both pages

context_for_next_testing_agent: Endpoint /api/data/source-audit is PUBLIC (no auth). Returns data_source=live when Odds API key configured and 0 mock ids. Badge testid: live-data-badge, tooltip testid: live-data-tooltip. In tooltip DOM, the LIVE/DÉMO tag text is lowercase but CSS-uppercased — assert case-insensitively.
